rule_metadata.author: James Ahearn
rule_metadata.title: Source Code Enumeration Detection by Keyword

rules.rule_text:
title: Source Code Enumeration Detection by Keyword
id: 953d460b-f810-420a-97a2-cfca4c98e602
status: test
description: Detects source code enumeration that use GET requests by keyword searches
  in URL strings
references:
- https://pentester.land/tutorials/2018/10/25/source-code-disclosure-via-exposed-git-folder.html
- https://medium.com/@logicbomb_1/bugbounty-how-i-was-able-to-download-the-source-code-of-indias-largest-telecom-service-52cf5c5640a1
author: James Ahearn
date: 2019-06-08
modified: 2022-10-05
tags:
- attack.discovery
- attack.t1083
logsource:
  category: webserver
detection:
  keywords:
  - .git/
  condition: keywords
falsepositives:
- Unknown
level: medium
